user.title: Select Connection Mode
user.description: Please select the connection method for Yeelight Pro.

cloud_auth.title: Access Token authentication
cloud_auth.description:
Please enter the Access Token for Yeelight Pro.

Domain: {domain}

cloud_auth_method.title: Select authentication method
cloud_auth_method.description: Select how to authenticate with Yeelight.

cloud_houses.title: Select House
cloud_houses.description: Please select the house to configure.

cloud_devices.title: Select devices
cloud_devices.description: Select the real devices to import into Home Assistant. By default all devices in this house are imported; after you clear selections, only selected devices will create entities.

private_config.title: Private Deployment URL
private_config.description: Enter the private deployment service root URL, for example https://private.example.com. The integration derives the Open API and Account API URLs automatically; authentication method, scan login, house selection, and device selection then follow the same flow as cloud setup. If WebSocket push uses a different host, enter the push URL too, for example wss://ws-private.example/ws.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthentication
reauth_confirm.description: The Access Token is no longer valid. Enter a new token to continue using Yeelight Pro (domain: {domain}).

cloud_region.title: Select cloud region
cloud_region.description: Select the region for your Yeelight account.

lan_config.title: Select LAN Gateway
lan_config.description: The system has discovered the following gateways. Select one to connect, or choose the last option to enter manually.

lan_manual.title: Enter Gateway Address Manually
lan_manual.description:
Enter the local network address of your Yeelight Pro gateway.

Note: The gateway must have LAN control enabled in the Yeelight APP.

cloud_scan_login.title: Yeelight APP scan login

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed, please check Access Token
error.scan_login_expired: The QR code has expired. Select refresh QR code and try again.

init.title: Yeelight Pro Options
init.description: Choose what to configure. Cloud mode does not show local gateway settings.

general.title: Yeelight Pro General Settings
general.description: Adjust polling, debug, and cloud live update settings. Cloud mode does not include local gateway settings; return to the previous step to configure device import filtering with the dedicated wizard.

filter_categories.title: Select Device Categories
filter_categories.description: Choose which device categories to import. Deselected categories will not be imported.

filter_rooms.title: Select Rooms
filter_rooms.description: Choose which rooms to import devices from. Devices in deselected rooms will not be imported.

filter_gateways.title: Select Gateways
filter_gateways.description: Choose which gateways to import devices from. Devices under deselected gateways will not be imported.

filter_devices.title: Select Devices
filter_devices.description: Choose specific devices to import. Deselected devices will not be imported.

confirm_runtime.title: Confirm Yeelight Pro Options
confirm_runtime.description: Will save {changed_count} option changes without reloading.

confirm_reload.title: Confirm and Reload Yeelight Pro
confirm_reload.description: Will save {changed_count} option changes and reload the integration.

cloud_devices.title: Select Cloud Devices
cloud_devices.description: Select Yeelight devices to import into Home Assistant.

assign_areas.name: Assign Areas
assign_areas.description: Assign areas to HA devices or devices linked to entities (admin service)

auto_assign_areas.name: Auto Assign Areas
auto_assign_areas.description: Assign areas based on room keywords in device names (admin service)

debug_emit_event.name: Emit Debug Event
debug_emit_event.description: Emit a debug Yeelight Pro device event to the Home Assistant event bus (admin service)

refresh.name: Manual Refresh
refresh.description: Refresh loaded Yeelight Pro data and synchronize device and entity registries (admin service)

refresh_product_schemas.name: Refresh product schemas
refresh_product_schemas.description: Force refetching product schemas used by current devices; cached schemas remain as fallback if fetching fails

cleanup_registry.name: Registry cleanup dry-run
cleanup_registry.description: Dry-run stale Yeelight Pro entities; after confirmation, disable stale entities through the Home Assistant registry (admin service)

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional for dry-run across loaded entries; required when confirming a target entry

confirm.name: Confirm cleanup
confirm.description: Set true to confirm execution; the audit_id from dry-run is required

audit_id.name: Audit ID
audit_id.description: Audit ID returned by dry-run; must match the current stale result when confirming

device_topology_changed.title: Yeelight Pro device list changed
device_topology_changed.description:
Yeelight Pro detected a device or topology change and automatically synchronized the Home Assistant device and entity registries.

Change summary: added {added}, removed {removed}, metadata changed {metadata_changed}.

Current aggregate counts: devices {devices}, gateways {gateways}, areas {areas}, rooms {rooms}, groups {groups}, houses {houses}, scenes {scenes}.

If devices or entities do not look right, open the integration page to review the entity list and reload the integration if needed.
